top_signals.title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
top_signals.summary: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apple Briefly Tops Nvidia as World’s Most Valuable Company
top_signals.summary: Apple Inc. briefly overtook Nvidia Corp. as the world’s most valuable company, a title the chipmaker has held since May 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
top_signals.summary: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.

top_signals.title: Stripe and Swift race to control the next generation of global payments infrastructure
Renault 5 E-Tech 2025 three month review – first impressions
top_signals.summary: My first rendez-vous with the Renault 5 was at a rain-lashed EV charging hub, just off the A1(M) in Stevenage. Not the most auspicious start, you might think, but somehow this little car seemed to prise the sunshine out from between leaden clouds. I was smitten. The occasion was a driving day for UK Car [...]

top_signals.title: Abbott probes two cyber incidents amid extortion claims
top_signals.summary: Abbott Laboratories is investigating two separate cybersecurity incidents after confirming unauthorized access to internal legacy Exact Sciences systems in its Cancer Diagnostics business, while also investigating a separate claim that attackers breached its LabCentral portal and stole company data.
